query:
-- Apply known wholesale costs to zero-cost SasBoss services

-- 1. NBN 50/20 Unlimited - Access4/SasBoss wholesale ~$35/month
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 35.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [PRICEBOOK FIX] NBN 50/20 Unlimited wholesale cost set to $35.00/month - verify against Access4 pricebook')
WHERE planName LIKE '%NBN 50/20%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- 2. NBN 100/40 Unlimited - Access4/SasBoss wholesale ~$50/month
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 50.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [PRICEBOOK FIX] NBN 100/40 Unlimited wholesale cost set to $50.00/month - verify against Access4 pricebook')
WHERE planName LIKE '%NBN 100/40%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- 3. 4 Channels Business SIP - ChannelHaus cost is $212/month (4 × $53)
-- But these are SasBoss-sourced so they may use Access4 SIP pricing
-- Flag for review rather than assume ChannelHaus rate
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] 4 Channels SIP has $0 cost - verify wholesale cost (ChannelHaus: $212/mo, Access4: TBC)')
WHERE planName LIKE '%4 Channels Business SIP%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- 4. 3 Channels Business SIP - ChannelHaus cost is $159/month (3 × $53)
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] 3 Channels SIP has $0 cost - verify wholesale cost (ChannelHaus: $159/mo, Access4: TBC)')
WHERE planName LIKE '%3 Channels Business SIP%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- 5. 2 Channels Business SIP - ChannelHaus cost is $106/month (2 × $53)
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] 2 Channels SIP has $0 cost - verify wholesale cost (ChannelHaus: $106/mo, Access4: TBC)')
WHERE planName LIKE '%2 Channels Business SIP%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- 6. 5 Channels Business SIP - ChannelHaus cost is $265/month (5 × $53)
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] 5 Channels SIP has $0 cost - verify wholesale cost (ChannelHaus: $265/mo, Access4: TBC)')
WHERE planName LIKE '%5 Channels Business SIP%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- 7. Number Rental (1#, 2# rental) - typically $0.50-$1.50/number wholesale
-- These are very low cost, flag for review
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] Number rental has $0 cost - verify wholesale number rental cost (~$0.50-$1.50/number/month)')
WHERE (planName LIKE '%# Rental%') AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- 8. Managed Voice Support 1-10 Users - flag for review
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] Managed Voice Support has $0 cost - verify wholesale cost')
WHERE planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- 9. Data - Internet (generic) - flag for review, could be NBN or 4G
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] Data-Internet service has $0 cost - verify wholesale NBN/internet cost')
WHERE planName = 'Data - Internet' AND supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- Summary of changes
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 35.00 AND planName LIKE '%NBN 50/20%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nbn50Fixed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 50.00 AND planName LIKE '%NBN 100/40%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nbn100Fixed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0.00 AND discoveryNotes LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flaggedForReview,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as stillZeroCost
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss';

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

-- 9. Data - Internet (generic) - flag for review, could be NBN or 4G

-- Summary of changes
SELECT

  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 50.00 AND planName LIKE '%NBN 100/40%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nbn100Fixed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0.00 AND discoveryNotes LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flaggedForReview,

FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss';
